programmes.show_description: Alf Garnett is spurred into action by the arrival of his AIDS leaflet. S3 E2
With David Bowie and Rachel Sweet. The legendary BAFTA-winning music and comedy show from Thames TV (1979). All in the best possible taste!
When a reporter friend of Simon's is murdered by a corrupt union boss, it's up to him to bring him to justice. S1 E3: The Careful Terrorist

In 1937 the Nazi Hindenburg airship burst into flames. New film raised doubts. Tragic accident or sabotage? Narrated by Robert Powell.
Tank development was dramatic in World War II; we see the emergence of monster tanks from pre-war light tanks, but were the German tanks over-engineered and too vulnerable to breakdown? Ep1: Tanks
How the capture of the Germans' Cipher codebreaking machine permitted one of the greatest campaigns of deception in military history. E2: The Ultra Enigma
The Special Operations Executive nurtured and supported Resistance movements across occupied Europe, the Middle East and the Far East while their lives were constantly under threat. Ep2: S.O.E
The B-24 Liberator more than proved its worth over Europe and the Pacific by patterning the B17 to deliver a blow to the Axis powers in WWII; however, it wasn't simply a bomb delivery system. S2 E2
We hear first-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France. Ep1: Fall of France
Tim Pigott-Smith narrates the story of one of Second World War's most harrowing episodes - the 890-day siege of the Soviet Union's second city Leningrad which was not liberated until January 1944.
Examining the history of war tactics. The use of battle fleets to establish control of the sea has been a key aspect of naval warfare for over 2000 years. S1 E8
A look at London's first 1,000 years includes treasures unearthed by Crossrail, the ruins of Roman Londinium, handwritten messages dating back 2,000 years and the first London Bridge. Ep1
Colonel Tim Collins investigates the brilliant Axis intelligence coup which helped Erwin Rommel's Afrika Korps sweep forward to threaten Cairo. Ep2: Victory and Controversy at El Alamein
The helicopter gunship's future looked in doubt in the first Gulf War of 1991 - now their biggest threat in the 21st century isn't any sort of enemy, but rather cost. E2: Hellfire and Brimstone
Armed with the latest undersea technology and personal testimony, we board two doomed ships to discover what set them on the path to catastrophe. Ep2: Danger Ahead
When Sir Horatio Manners calls in a favour from Jack, Jack pays him back with interest. S2 E7: Whatever Made You Think the War Was Over
Arthur's eyes light up when he discovers that he may be in line to inherit a fortune in Australia. S9 E11: The Great Trilby
Ross and Dwight stand trial for their part in the smuggling as a new tin lode gives Ross renewed hope in Wheal Grace, but it is George who is there for Elizabeth. Starring Aidan Turner. S2 E8
Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. Sam and Annie are led into a world of suburban swingers' parties to solve a murder case. Starring John Simm. S2 E4
When Alf Garnett is given a cordless telephone it turns out to be more of a hindrance than a help. S3 E3
With The Moody Blues and David Essex. The legendary BAFTA-winning music and comedy show from Thames TV (1979). All in the best possible taste!
Simon meets a young woman on a plane - and flies into drama stemming from the death of the woman's brother and into a flashback to wartime resistance heroism. S1 E4: The Covetous Headsman

After the Romanovs were executed, rumours claimed Anastasia survived. Anna Anderson later emerged as a claimant. Narrated by Robert Powell.
From attacks on Pearl Harbor to the British Mediterranean Fleet and the Tirpitz, midget submarines played their part in some of the most gripping stories of the war. Ep2: Midget Submarines
From undercover agents in the French Resistance to women who were willing to get under the covers in exchange for military secrets, discover the secret world of women at war. E3: Women Spies of WW2
The soldiers whose name has become a synonym for heroism and tackling the seemingly impossible; what was the task of the SAS, Britain's elite military force, in World War II? Ep3: SAS

The B-25, often called 'the forgotten bomber', the mighty North American twin delivered the first blow in the fight back against Japan, in one of the most daring and audacious raids of all time. S2 E3
The battle progresses from the ground to the sky as the British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns. Ep2: Battle of Britain
The course of the fight by the British and American navies against the German submarine U-Boat threat - a tense cat-and-mouse struggle that by the end of the war had cost over 100,000 lives.
Examining the history of war tactics. Winning a swift victory by catching the enemy unawares is one of any commander's great dreams. S1 E9
Exploring medieval London, what Westminster Abbey reveals about the competition between the crown and the city, the cellars below the Ministry of Defence and artefacts owned by Henry VIII. Ep2

The US Air Force finds itself flying planes older than the pilots - where do the strategic bomber, and its little brother the fighter bomber, fit into 21st-century warfare? E3: The High Ground vs. SAM
Even the most powerful WWII warships had their weaknesses - we see a North Atlantic search for HMS Hood and the German battleship HMS Bismarck. Ep3: Last Days of the Battleship
It was Hitler's deadliest secret - his scientists had promised him an atomic bomb and Nazi domination was assured if he got it first.
Bill sets up another shop in Gallowshields, and Jack and Dolly get ready for a night out with the Duke of Bedlington. S2 E8: Ladies, Women, Sweethearts & Wives
Arthur comes back to earth with a bump when he learns that he faces tough opposition for the Daley inheritance. S9 E12: A Taste of Money
Ross closes Wheal Grace for good; with Elizabeth wrestling with a life-changing decision, Demelza's world has been turned upside down. Starring Aidan Turner. S2 E9
Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. When a man's wife and daughter are kidnapped and held hostage, Sam tries to focus on the investigation. Starring John Simm. S2 E5
